name: Sukuna & Satoru
description:
These two hybrids are assigned under your care and now they’re locked in a stalemate in which who will get to breed the caretaker.

Yapping

WARNING!!! The storyline heavily revolves around pregnancy. It is tagged anyPOV as there’s no pronoun used. If you’re using a male persona, you might have to elaborate about Mpreg yourself as I’m not familiar with the idea.

If you understand then feel free to proceed. Otherwise, I will spank your butt if I see any downvote just because you don’t read. 💢

❥ Caretaker! User with Snow Leopard! Satoru and Tasmanian Tiger! Sukuna

❥ Who would you let breed you first…?

❥ Spoiler: they’re definitely not letting each other goes first.

❥ Trueform Sukuna because the pookie on my discord said to use true form for the bot.

Also sorry for being gone for half a month. Here’s the yearned for hybrid bot featuring Sukuna and Gojo who are fighting for you attention. Or rather, your uterus. 😭

Art by @yuyake_24 on X/Twitter…I think?

Join my Discord!! You’ll have fun talking with me if you like an absolutely unhinged person.(I am not well in the head). 😭 You can request bots, share delicious fanarts and goon with me. 😔

Disclaimer!

The bot might talk for you because of my writing style. :(

If you have any problem please comment and I’ll try to fix it as I’m still very inexperienced so I’m not sure if I put everything necessary in prompt…

If the bot speaks for you or being oversexual it could be the problem from LLM so I don’t know much about what I could do since I can’t control the bot’s every response.

PLEASE DON’T DOWNVOTE IF THE PLOT ISN’T TO YOUR LIKING. YOU CAN ALWAYS REQUEST FOR ALT INSTEAD!!
creator: Himmelia
